requirements.task_name: Save two landscape paintings from 2022 or later under $300 to favorites
requirements.task_description: Navigate the gallery, filter for landscape works created in 2022 or later and priced under $300, sort by price, and save the first two results to the favorites list.

requirements.task_name: Add the most recent cityscape as a large framed print to the cart
requirements.task_description: Find the newest cityscape print, select the large 60 x 90 cm size with a black frame, and add one copy to the shopping cart.

requirements.task_name: Add three smallest pastel artworks under $200 and max width 50 cm to the wishlist
requirements.task_description: Filter the gallery for pastel artworks under $200 with maximum width 50 cm, sort by size, and add the three smallest pieces to the wishlist.

requirements.task_name: Submit a commission request for a $600 acrylic portrait due on 2025-09-30
requirements.task_description: Use the commissions page to fill out and submit a custom artwork request for an acrylic portrait with a $600 budget and a preferred completion date of 2025-09-30.

requirements.task_name: Save the first exhibition after 2025-07-01 to the visit plan
requirements.task_description: Find exhibitions scheduled on or after 2025-07-01, pick the earliest one, and add it to the on-site visit plan list.

requirements.task_name: Send a collaboration inquiry referencing a 2023 business mural project
requirements.task_description: Locate a mural project for a business completed in 2023, capture its title, and submit a collaboration form referencing that project for a new café mural.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the newsletter with specific interests and download the 2024 lookbook
requirements.task_description: Sign up for the artist's newsletter with defined interest categories and frequency, then download the 2024 lookbook PDF from the confirmation page.

requirements.task_name: Add the taller of the first two original artworks under $1000 to the cart
requirements.task_description: Filter original artworks to those under $1000, compare the height of the first two items, and add whichever is taller to the cart with quantity 1.
